name: Resource Overview
description: Resource usage visualization with quotas, gauges, and progress bars. Color-coded by utilization level for infrastructure monitoring.

gauge-grid.description: Resource gauge cards in a responsive grid. Each card shows resource name, usage bar, current/max values, and status chip.

slots.header: Section title with overall usage summary Badge
slots.gauge-card: Card per resource with icon, name, progress bar, usage fraction, and status Chip
slots.progress-bar: Color-coded bar: <50% success, 50-70% primary, 70-90% warning, >90% error

summary-bar.description: Compact inline resource summary with horizontal bars. Single-row overview of all resources.

slots.resource-item: Inline item with icon, label, compact progress bar, and percentage text

slots.header: Section title with overall usage summary
slots.gauge-card: Card per resource with progress bar and status
